shots.title: MetaphorDefinition interface + metaphor registry
shots.notes: Created metaphor.ts with MetaphorDefinition, 10 term map types, registry (register/get/list/has/validate). 6 metaphor definitions (golf, tennis, baseball, gaming, dnd, matrix). 82 core tests, all passed.

shots.title: Metaphor-aware formatters

hazards.description: capitalize() only uppercases first char — needed titleCase() with regex /\b\w/g for multi-word vocabulary terms like '19th Hole' and 'Save Point'

shots.notes: Updated formatSprintReview, formatBriefing, formatAdvisorReport with optional MetaphorDefinition parameter. All backward compatible — omitting metaphor gives identical output. 17 new tests.

shots.title: CLI metaphor resolution + config support
shots.notes: Created resolveMetaphor() with fallback chain (flag → config → golf). Updated card, review, briefing commands. slope init --metaphor flag. 6 CLI tests.

shots.title: Metaphor documentation + validation
shots.notes: Updated CLAUDE.md with Metaphor System section, test counts, package description.

conditions.description: New subsystem (metaphor engine) touching core + CLI — 10 new source files, 7 modified
Context continued from previous session — required reconstruction from summary

nutrition.description: Full build+test after every ticket (516 tests at completion)
Commit-per-ticket discipline — 4 commits for 4 tickets, pushed after each
105 new tests across core (82 metaphor + 17 formatter/briefing) and CLI (6 metaphor)

nineteenth_hole.how_did_it_feel: Clean execution. The metaphor engine is display-only by design — internal types stay golf-derived, which prevented a massive rename cascade. 6 complete metaphor definitions ship with zero breaking changes.
nineteenth_hole.advice_for_next_player: When adding titleCase/capitalize helpers for vocabulary display, use regex /\b\w/g to capitalize each word. Also, metaphor barrel import (metaphors/index.ts) auto-registers via side effects — importing @slope-dev/core ensures all metaphors are registered.
nineteenth_hole.what_surprised_you: The scope was well-estimated. S8-2 (long_iron) was the most complex as expected — touching formatters across core. The titleCase bug was the only hazard across 4 tickets.
nineteenth_hole.excited_about_next: Metaphors are the foundation for S9 (cross-platform) — templates can now be generated dynamically per-metaphor. The engine is extensible — community metaphors just need a MetaphorDefinition object.

bunker_locations: titleCase vs capitalize: vocabulary terms like '19th hole' need each word capitalized, not just the first char
yardage_book_updates: metaphor.ts: Map-based registry with getMetaphor fallback to golf, validateMetaphor checks all 10 term maps + vocabulary
metaphors/index.ts: barrel import registers all 6 metaphors via side effects on import
Formatter pattern: optional metaphor?: MetaphorDefinition parameter, use m?.clubs[shot.club] ?? shot.club for backward compat
CLI fallback chain: --metaphor flag → config.metaphor → 'golf' default, resolveMetaphor() in packages/cli/src/metaphor.ts
course_management_notes: Tests grew from 411 to 516 (+105 across core and CLI)
